title: City data platform and AI knowledge assistant RFP
content: Build a data platform, data governance workflow, private cloud deployment and AI knowledge base with API integration.

title: University cybersecurity operations center procurement
content: Procure a security operations center, SIEM, vulnerability scanning, identity management and penetration testing services.

title: Hospital diagnostic imaging equipment purchase
content: Purchase medical imaging and diagnostic systems with installation and maintenance.

title: Public building renovation and HVAC upgrade
content: General contractor for building renovation, HVAC system replacement and energy saving works.

title: Solar and battery storage microgrid project
content: Design and deploy solar photovoltaic generation, battery energy storage and a microgrid energy management system.

title: Office cafeteria operation service
content: Cafeteria staffing, food supply and daily operation service.
